Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Platform bug fix
- [ ] Platform feature
- [ ] Curriculum / masterclass content
- [ ] Docs / infra
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

### For all PRs
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] **No live malware, no un-defanged IOCs, no victim data** is included.

### For code changes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test-api` passes (or N/A)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes (or N/A)
- [ ] Updated docs/README if endpoints or behavior changed (or N/A)

### For curriculum changes
- [ ] Follows the seven-part module shape (`masterclass/_template/`)
- [ ] Includes a working lab **and** a complete solution
- [ ] Uses a benign training binary (source only) OR references a real sample by SHA-256 without committing it
- [ ] All IOCs are defanged

## Notes for reviewers
